meta.title: Momcozy Storefront Technical Audit
meta.scope: Public storefront homepage and one product-detail journey
meta.method: Single-session Chromium observation with resource and rendering instrumentation

summary.verdict: The storefront has a credible brand foundation, while rendering weight, third-party resilience, and mobile interaction deserve focused engineering work.
strengths: Stable layout during the observed render
Fast initial server response in the observed session
risks: The primary visual arrived late in the observed session
Third-party failures can add noise and weaken attribution confidence
Mobile purchase controls need explicit usability validation

metrics.label: Largest contentful paint
metrics.interpretation: The observed hero visual appeared later than the recommended good threshold.

metrics.label: First contentful paint
metrics.interpretation: The first visible content was delayed in the observed session.

metrics.label: Server response
metrics.interpretation: The initial server response was healthy during the observation.

metrics.label: Layout shift
metrics.interpretation: Visual stability was strong during the observed render.

forensics.label: Observed third-party request failures
forensics.interpretation: A small set of third-party calls failed during the session and should be isolated from the purchase path.

forensics.label: Observed long tasks
forensics.interpretation: Main-thread work showed short periods that may affect responsiveness on slower devices.

forensics.label: Audited journeys
forensics.interpretation: Findings are directional and should be revalidated across more templates and real-user conditions.

recommendations.title: Make the hero image the rendering priority
recommendations.action: Preload the selected hero asset, emit responsive dimensions, and remove competing above-the-fold work.
recommendations.validation: Repeat lab measurements across representative mobile and desktop profiles.

recommendations.title: Return real not-found responses
recommendations.action: Serve unknown paths and private data paths with an HTTP 404 instead of the homepage.
recommendations.validation: Automate status checks for an unknown path and a blocked data path after every deploy.

recommendations.title: Isolate optional third parties
recommendations.action: Delay nonessential integrations and keep failures outside the critical purchase path.
recommendations.validation: Run a controlled test with each optional integration unavailable.

recommendations.title: Validate mobile purchase controls
recommendations.action: Keep tap targets comfortably sized and prevent tables, URLs, and navigation from widening the page.
recommendations.validation: Run automated and human checks at a 390-pixel viewport.

glossary.definition: Time until the largest visible content element is rendered.
Time until the browser renders the first visible content.
A measure of unexpected visual movement during page load.
How strongly the limited public evidence supports a finding.
